name: TF Watch [AtF - AnyPoV]
description:
You were camping, and then, strange magical watch suddenly appeared and now it's attached to your arm.

Woah, is that a silhouette of a woman? Weird... You should check it!

Apparently, you can transform into a set of 20 different archetypes, that will enhance your abilities in certain areas...! But... Are you prepared to be someone different temporarily?

Obviously based on Ben 10. I could've make basically a transformation-based version of the Chaquetrix, but it would be too boring... So, again, this isn't about female hot and sexy aliens, but generic "sexy" archetypes.

HOWEVER, if you guys want, just request below if you truly want the Omnitrix/Chaquetrix blend version.

Or also if you guys want a male version of this TF Watch.
creator: Riley_the_TF_Creator
